Here on the [[Lifeism Wiki]] in contrast to Wikipedia Original research is encouraged [[Category:Lifeism Wiki]] Use [[:Template:Original Research]] to indicate your original research. While this wiki is currently just used by [[Immanuelle]] and so uncited content and templates without a name can be attributed to them, over time more people will use this wiki so adding your name to the template will be more important
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
